text.message: I think that was my best spot
That was the greedier of the choices
There’s no ore for me to take
I was willing to help you blue
Help what you are leading lol
Just wanna ruin my game red?
Not really black traded him the spot
Let’s be real blue, your first pick made no sense
To be fair I traded both lol
My first pick makes no sense lol
You left black with a cracked set up
And you choose to ruin my game and not black lol
I didn’t ruin anyone’s game I settled what was best for me
lol up to you trade or end game ez
Not sure why I’m the target
Road can easily take road anytime soon
